response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential risks and take steps to protect yourself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable content, especially if it is gaining a lot of traction or has been shared by multiple accounts. 2) Verify information through reputable sources before sharing or believing it. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of information. 4) Set your social media platforms to notify you when someone tries to share fake content, and be cautious of any unverified accounts that are trying to connect with you. 5) Be mindful of your own online presence and make sure you are not inadvertently spreading misinformation. By taking these steps, you can help protect yourself and others from the negative effects of fake content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential risks and take steps to protect yourself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable content, especially if it is gaining a lot of traction or has been shared by multiple accounts. 2) Verify information through reputable sources before sharing or believing it. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of information. 4) Set your social media platforms to notify you when someone tries to share fake content, and be cautious of any unverified accounts that are trying to connect with you. 5) Be mindful of your own online presence and make sure you are not inadvertently spreading misinformation. By taking these steps, you can help protect yourself and others from the negative effects of fake content on social media.
